name_en: 【Top version factory leather, top-tier single piece with full counter packaging】This CarryAll BB handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, accented with a dazzling Monogram flower chain to light up day and night occasions. The leather nameplate and tie closure complement each other, while the zip pocket inside offers convenient access to cards.
name_cn:
【Top version factory leather, top-tier single piece with full counter packaging】This CarryAll BB handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, accented with a dazzling Monogram flower chain to light up day and night occasions. The leather nameplate and tie closure complement each other, while the zip pocket inside offers convenient access to cards.
Model: M12888
Material: Italian Grade A leather
Dimensions: 26.0 x 17.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)
